scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-lightningcss.js && node scripts/optimize-images.mjs && node scripts/build-smart.js webpack
scripts.build:fast: node scripts/ensure-lightningcss.js && node scripts/optimize-images.mjs && node scripts/build-smart.js turbopack
scripts.deploy:zip: npm run build && rm -f ../out.tar.gz && tar -czf ../out.tar.gz -C out . && echo "\n✓ Built and packaged → $(realpath ../out.tar.gz)"
scripts.deploy:rsync: npm run build && rsync -avz --delete --human-readable --info=stats2,progress2 out/ hotproducts:domains/hotproductsdot.com/public_html/ && echo "\n✓ Synced to hotproductsdot.com"
